title: lyonia ligustrina var. foliosiflora
intro: Lyonia ligustrina var. foliosiflora, also known as the deciduous or autumn-blooming Lyonia, is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of Asia, belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lyonia ligustrina var. foliosiflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
